title: leucanthemum maximum
intro: Leucanthemum maximum, commonly known as the maximilian daisy or tansy daisy, is a perennial plant native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Leucanthemum maximum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to treat various ailments or as a preventative measure to maintain overall health and well-being.
